goal.original: Resume plan to-do 11.1 (visual diff verification). Complete prompt dock restructure (E), status bar restyle (F), then editor + editor-video + popups visual diffs.
goal.summary: Prompt dock (E) is functionally complete: MpiPromptBox now in normal flow (not fixed), single-row grid layout (neg-toggle | textarea | settings-badge | generate), copy button removed, media strip in flow above box, badge shows model/op stacked with ×N batch count, expand btn fully transparent, body background unified to --surface-canvas. Status bar restyle (F) not yet done. Editor/editor-video/popups visual diffs not yet done.

completed: 11.1 partial — prompt dock restructure (E) complete, gallery surface cards complete, background unified
pending: 11.1 — (F) STATUS BAR restyle: left side '● IDLE' or '◌ UPSCALING CROP_002 · 38% · 0:42 left', right side 'VRAM ─── X/Y' 'RAM ─── X/Y' tabular-nums
11.1 — (G) Editor surface visual diff: open editor.html + Electron editor side-by-side, user reports drift, fix
11.1 — (H) Editor-video surface diff: same for editor-video.html
11.1 — (I) Popups surface diff: same for popups.html

next_action.description: Read the status bar mockup section from docs/redesign/c-stage/gallery.html (the <footer class='bar'> block) and the current shell status bar implementation in styles/shell/components.css + js/shell.js. Brief the user on what needs to change, gate on approval, then implement: left slot shows job state dot + label (IDLE or active job name + % + time remaining), right slot shows VRAM and RAM gauges as 'VRAM ─── X/Y GB' 'RAM ─── X/Y GB' in tabular-nums mono. After status bar is signed off, move to editor.html visual diff.

key_decisions: MpiPromptBox moved from position:fixed floating to normal flow inside #prompt-box-mount (between tool-container and shell-info-bar). CSS is now display:grid 4-col, no fixed/transform/bottom/left.
Prompt dock layout: grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto auto — neg-toggle | textarea col (border-bottom underline only, no MpiInput chrome) | settings badge | generate btn.
Copy button removed entirely from PromptBox JS and CSS.
Media strip also in normal flow (not fixed), transparent bg, 5rem chips, left-aligned.
Expand/lock btn: fully transparent all states (matched .mpi-btn.mpi-ibtn.is-pressed:not(:disabled) specificity to beat MpiButton.css !important).
Settings badge now shows model name (top) + operation (bottom) stacked, with ×N batch count in pink when batch > 1. Refreshes on settings:model:update event.
body::before background changed from var(--surface-0) to var(--surface-canvas) — unified dark bg across all surfaces.
Textarea locked height changed from 3.5rem to 2rem in JS updateHeight(). Col uses align-self:end so it doesn't stretch grid row.
MpiInput wrapper chrome stripped via scoped CSS overrides on .mpi-prompt-box__col--prompt — gap:0, label hidden, wrapper margin/padding/border zeroed.
REDESIGN-DEVIATION: image stack mounts above prompt box (not inline-left as in mockup) — anticipates multi-image future. Comment to be added at call site.
constraints: Critical Rules Snapshot from CLAUDE.md always applies: BEM, ComponentFactory.create(), no hardcoded colors, no raw SVG, on/off from dom.js, Events bus, Hotkeys registry, factory locked.
Stage banned: glassmorphism (no backdrop-filter), bouncy easing, neon glow.
Test on Electron desktop only — browser broken for most features.
Mockups are SPEC not source. One-way: spec → code. Never modify docs/redesign/c-stage/*.html.
Status bar (shell-info-bar) is a shell-level component in styles/shell/components.css and wired in js/shell.js / js/shell/projectUI.js. Must check existing job-state event wiring before restyling.

Status bar mockup spec: footer .bar with left side (dot + IDLE text OR ring spinner + job name + % + time), right side (VRAM gauge + RAM gauge). Gauges use tabular-nums. The <footer class='bar'> in gallery.html is ground truth.
Do NOT update architectural rule files (.claude/rules/) without explicit user permission.

resume_prompt: Read docs/handoffs/2026-04-30-04-10-statusbar-editor-diffs.json end-to-end before doing anything. We are mid-execution of plan to-do 11.1 in docs/plans/2026-04-29-stage-redesign-port.md on branch worktree/quiet-shale. Prompt dock restructure (E) is complete: MpiPromptBox is now in normal DOM flow (not fixed), single-row grid layout, copy button removed, expand btn fully transparent, badge shows stacked model/op with ×N batch count, body background unified to --surface-canvas. NEXT: implement STATUS BAR restyle (F). Read the <footer class='bar'> block in docs/redesign/c-stage/gallery.html for the spec. Read styles/shell/components.css and js/shell.js to understand current wiring. Brief the user on changes needed before writing any code (Gate 1 of /mpi-execute-next). Status bar spec: left slot = dot + 'IDLE' or spinner ring + 'UPSCALING CROP_002 · 38% · 0:42 left'; right slot = 'VRAM ─── X/Y' 'RAM ─── X/Y' tabular-nums. After status bar is signed off, move sequentially to editor.html visual diff (G), editor-video.html (H), popups.html (I). Caveman mode is active. Mockups are SPEC not source — never modify them.
